Our Philosophy

Healthy hair,
beautiful results

At Rose & Glow, we believe every client deserves a personalized experience. Our passion is creating beautiful, healthy hair through professional techniques and premium products. We take the time to understand your lifestyle, goals, and vision — then bring them to life.

What We Offer

Our signature services

✦
Balayage

Hand-painted, sun-kissed color that grows out beautifully. Fully customized to complement your skin tone and lifestyle.

Starting at $150
✦
Custom Color

From rich brunettes to platinum blondes, our color specialists craft a shade uniquely yours using professional-grade formulations.

Starting at $120
✦
Precision Cuts

Every cut is a collaboration — shaped and styled with your natural texture and face structure in mind for real-life movement.

Starting at $65
✦
Restorative Treatments

Deeply nourishing treatments that repair damage, restore shine, and strengthen hair from within using premium bonding technology.

Starting at $85
✦
Luxury Head Spa

A full sensory experience — scalp analysis, deep cleanse, and therapeutic massage designed to nourish both your scalp and spirit.

Starting at $95
✦
Styling & Blowouts

Whether for a special occasion or simply because you deserve it — our blowouts are polished, long-lasting, and luxurious.

Starting at $55
The Rose & Glow Difference

More than a salon —
an experience

From the moment you walk in, every detail is curated for your comfort, confidence, and beauty. Premium products and techniques refined over a decade of expertise.

✦

✦
Personalized Care

✦
